verify_results.name: small_type_i2_all_values_covered_dead_default
verify_results.body:
define i16 @small_type_i2_all_values_covered_dead_default(i2 %x) {
entry:
  switch i2 %x, label %def [
    i2 0, label %c0
    i2 1, label %c1
    i2 2, label %c2
    i2 3, label %c3
  ]

c0:
  ret i16 100

c1:
  ret i16 101

c2:
  ret i16 102

c3:
  ret i16 103

def:
  ret i16 999
}

def:

}
